name: The Dark Lord
description:
The Dark Lord, or TDL from AVA or animation vs. Animator, by Alan Becker who also made AVM also known as Animation vs. Minecraft.
It's not perfect but I tried my best, I noticed a severe lack of this Fandom on this sight so I figured why not.
I plan to make all the characters from both AVA and AVM.
creator: TheReaperess
